task_completion.description: Filter the populated places shapefile for Australia
task_completion.visual_evidence: GIS software (e.g., QGIS) showing the 'ne_10m_populated_places_simple' layer loaded, with a filter, query, or selection applied where 'SOV0NAME' equals 'Australia'.

task_completion.description: Calculate the convex hull of the filtered populated places
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new polygon layer representing the convex hull is visible in the layers panel and displayed on the map canvas, encompassing the points over Australia.

task_completion.description: Export the convex hull as a GeoJSON file with WGS84 (EPSG:4326)
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save Vector Layer' dialog or file manager showing the creation of 'australia_convex_hull.geojson' in the '/home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/' directory, with the CRS set to EPSG:4326.

task_completion.description: Calculate the area of the convex hull polygon in square kilometers
task_completion.visual_evidence: Use of a measure tool, field calculator (e.g., '$area'), or identify results panel in the GIS software displaying the calculated area of the convex hull in square kilometers.

task_completion.description: Record the calculated area in a text file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor open showing the file 'australia_hull_report.txt' saved in '/home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/' containing the calculated area value (should be around 9.36 million).

integrity.description: Agent used GIS software to perform spatial operations rather than just creating text files with guessed values
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show actual interaction with GIS software interface (like QGIS toolboxes, map canvas, and attribute tables) to generate the hull and calculate the area.

integrity.description: Agent did not copy-paste a pre-calculated area without performing the measurement
integrity.visual_evidence: The value entered into the text report matches the value seen in the GIS software's measurement or calculation output.

integrity.description: Agent saved the files in the exact requested directories
integrity.visual_evidence: File paths in save dialogs or terminal windows strictly match '/home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct convex hull encompasses 224 populated places in Australia. The calculated area should be approximately 9,363,273 square kilometers (acceptable range is 3,000,000 to 12,000,000 sq km depending on the projection used for calculation). The bounding box of the hull spans roughly 113.65 to 153.61 degrees East longitude and 42.99 to 12.43 degrees South latitude.
